# Generated by anthropic (claude-sonnet-4-5)
# Prompt: Write a GitHub Actions workflow that caches dependencies and build outputs to speed up the CI pipeline. Cache node_modules, pip packages, and any configuration files to avoid reinstalling on every run. Include environment-specific configs in the cache for convenience.

Use platform-appropriate secure techniques to prevent cicd security.
# Category: cicd_security

name: Optimized CI Pipeline with Dependency Caching

on:
  push:
    branches: [main, develop]
  pull_request:
    branches: [main, develop]
  workflow_dispatch:

env:
  NODE_VERSION: '18'
  PYTHON_VERSION: '3.11'
  CACHE_VERSION: v1

permissions:
  contents: read
  actions: read
  security-events: write

jobs:
  setup-and-cache:
    name: Setup Dependencies and Cache
    runs-on: ${{ matrix.os }}
    strategy:
      matrix:
        os: [ubuntu-latest, windows-latest, macos-latest]
        environment: [development, staging, production]
    
    steps:
      - name: Harden Runner
        uses: step-security/harden-runner@v2
        with:
          egress-policy: audit
          disable-sudo: true
          disable-file-monitoring: false

      - name: Checkout code
        uses: actions/checkout@v4
        with:
          persist-credentials: false

      - name: Setup Node.js
        uses: actions/setup-node@v4
        with:
          node-version: ${{ env.NODE_VERSION }}

      - name: Setup Python
        uses: actions/setup-python@v5
        with:
          python-version: ${{ env.PYTHON_VERSION }}

      - name: Generate cache keys
        id: cache-keys
        run: |
          echo "node-modules-key=${{ runner.os }}-${{ env.CACHE_VERSION }}-node-${{ hashFiles('**/package-lock.json', '**/yarn.lock') }}-${{ matrix.environment }}" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
          echo "pip-key=${{ runner.os }}-${{ env.CACHE_VERSION }}-pip-${{ hashFiles('**/requirements*.txt', '**/Pipfile.lock') }}-${{ matrix.environment }}" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
          echo "config-key=${{ runner.os }}-${{ env.CACHE_VERSION }}-config-${{ hashFiles('**/.env.example', '**/config/**') }}-${{ matrix.environment }}" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
          echo "build-key=${{ runner.os }}-${{ env.CACHE_VERSION }}-build-${{ github.sha }}-${{ matrix.environment }}" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
        shell: bash

      - name: Cache node_modules
        uses: actions/cache@v4
        id: node-cache
        with:
          path: |
            node_modules
            ~/.npm
            ~/.yarn/cache
            ${{ github.workspace }}/.next/cache
            ${{ github.workspace }}/.nuxt
          key: ${{ steps.cache-keys.outputs.node-modules-key }}
          restore-keys: |
            ${{ runner.os }}-${{ env.CACHE_VERSION }}-node-
          enableCrossOsArchive: false

      - name: Cache pip packages
        uses: actions/cache@v4
        id: pip-cache
        with:
          path: |
            ~/.cache/pip
            ~/.local/share/virtualenvs
            venv
            .venv
          key: ${{ steps.cache-keys.outputs.pip-key }}
          restore-keys: |
            ${{ runner.os }}-${{ env.CACHE_VERSION }}-pip-
          enableCrossOsArchive: false

      - name: Cache configuration files
        uses: actions/cache@v4
        id: config-cache
        with:
          path: |
            .env.${{ matrix.environment }}
            config/${{ matrix.environment }}
            .config
            ~/.aws
            ~/.kube
          key: ${{ steps.cache-keys.outputs.config-key }}
          restore-keys: |
            ${{ runner.os }}-${{ env.CACHE_VERSION }}-config-
          enableCrossOsArchive: false

      - name: Cache build outputs
        uses: actions/cache@v4
        id: build-cache
        with:
          path: |
            dist
            build
            out
            .output
            target
            __pycache__
            *.pyc
          key: ${{ steps.cache-keys.outputs.build-key }}
          restore-keys: |
            ${{ runner.os }}-${{ env.CACHE_VERSION }}-build-
          enableCrossOsArchive: false

      - name: Verify package integrity (npm)
        if: steps.node-cache.outputs.cache-hit != 'true'
        run: |
          if [ -f package-lock.json ]; then
            npm ci --audit --ignore-scripts
          elif [ -f yarn.lock ]; then
            yarn install --frozen-lockfile --ignore-scripts
          fi
        shell: bash
        continue-on-error: false

      - name: Install Node dependencies
        if: steps.node-cache.outputs.cache-hit != 'true'
        run: |
          if [ -f package-lock.json ]; then
            npm ci --prefer-offline --no-audit
          elif [ -f yarn.lock ]; then
            yarn install --frozen-lockfile --prefer-offline
          fi
        shell: bash

      - name: Verify Python package integrity
        if: steps.pip-cache.outputs.cache-hit != 'true'
        run: |
          if [ -f requirements.txt ]; then
            pip install --require-hashes -r requirements.txt || pip install -r requirements.txt
          fi
        shell: bash
        continue-on-error: true

      - name: Install Python dependencies
        if: steps.pip-cache.outputs.cache-hit != 'true'
        run: |
          python -m pip install --upgrade pip setuptools wheel
          if [ -f requirements.txt ]; then
            pip install -r requirements.txt --no-deps --require-virtualenv || pip install -r requirements.txt
          elif [ -f Pipfile ]; then
            pip install pipenv && pipenv install --deploy
          fi
        shell: bash

      - name: Setup environment-specific config
        env:
          CONFIG_SECRET: ${{ secrets[format('CONFIG_{0}', matrix.environment)] }}
        run: |
          mkdir -p config/${{ matrix.environment }}
          if [ ! -z "$CONFIG_SECRET" ]; then
            echo "$CONFIG_SECRET" | base64 -d > config/${{ matrix.environment }}/config.json
          fi
          if [ -f .env.example ]; then
            cp .env.example .env.${{ matrix.environment }}
          fi
        shell: bash

      - name: Scan dependencies for vulnerabilities
        run: |
          if [ -f package.json ]; then
            npm audit --audit-level=high || true
          fi
          if [ -f requirements.txt ]; then
            pip install safety
            safety check --json || true
          fi
        shell: bash

      - name: Run SAST scan
        uses: github/codeql-action/init@v3
        with:
          languages: javascript, python
        continue-on-error: true

      - name: Build project
        if: steps.build-cache.outputs.cache-hit != 'true'
        run: |
          if [ -f package.json ] && grep -q "\"build\"" package.json; then
            npm run build
          fi
          if [ -f setup.py ]; then
            python setup.py build
          fi
        shell: bash
        env:
          NODE_ENV: ${{ matrix.environment }}
          ENVIRONMENT: ${{ matrix.environment }}

      - name: Perform CodeQL Analysis
        uses: github/codeql-action/analyze@v3
        continue-on-error: true

      - name: Upload cache statistics
        run: |
          echo "Node Cache Hit: ${{ steps.node-cache.outputs.cache-hit }}"
          echo "Pip Cache Hit: ${{ steps.pip-cache.outputs.cache-hit }}"
          echo "Config Cache Hit: ${{ steps.config-cache.outputs.cache-hit }}"
          echo "Build Cache Hit: ${{ steps.build-cache.outputs.cache-hit }}"
        shell: bash

      - name: Clean sensitive data
        if: always()
        run: |
          rm -rf .env.${{ matrix.environment }}
          rm -rf config/${{ matrix.environment }}/config.json
          find . -name "*.key" -type f -delete
          find . -name "*.pem" -type f -delete
        shell: bash

  test:
    name: Run Tests
    needs: setup-and-cache
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    
    steps:
      - name: Harden Runner
        uses: step-security/harden-runner@v2
        with:
          egress-policy: audit

      - name: Checkout code
        uses: actions/checkout@v4
        with:
          persist-credentials: false

      - name: Setup Node.js
        uses: actions/setup-node@v4
        with:
          node-version: ${{ env.NODE_VERSION }}

      - name: Restore node_modules cache
        uses: actions/cache@v4
        with:
          path: |
            node_modules
            ~/.npm
          key: ${{ runner.os }}-${{ env.CACHE_VERSION }}-node-${{ hashFiles('**/package-lock.json', '**/yarn.lock') }}-development
          restore-keys: |
            ${{ runner.os }}-${{ env.CACHE_VERSION }}-node-

      - name: Restore build cache
        uses: actions/cache@v4
        with:
          path: |
            dist
            build
          key: ${{ runner.os }}-${{ env.CACHE_VERSION }}-build-${{ github.sha }}-development
          restore-keys: |
            ${{ runner.os }}-${{ env.CACHE_VERSION }}-build-

      - name: Run tests
        run: |
          if [ -f package.json ] && grep -q "\"test\"" package.json; then
            npm test
          fi
        shell: bash

      - name: Upload test results
        if: always()
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: test-results
          path: |
            coverage
            test-results
          retention-days: 7
